Meta.description: NEXAI builds intelligent AI employees — voice agents, chatbots, sales agents and custom automations that save time, cut costs and grow revenue. Based in Frankenhardt, working across Germany.

Footer.tagline: We build digital employees — AI agents that take work off your team and move your business forward.
Footer.newsletterText: Insights on applied AI — once or twice a month, no spam.
